title: goniophlebium verrucosum
intro: Goniophlebium verrucosum is a species of ferns in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and other parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Goniophlebium verrucosum are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or decocting them in a solvent to create teas, infusions, or topical ointments for medicinal use.
